allow: Bash(docker exec retro_board-frontend-1 sh -c "nginx -t 2>&1 && curl -s http://localhost:3000 | head -5")
Bash(docker exec retro_board-frontend-1 sh -c "wget -qO- http://localhost:3000 2>&1 | head -3")
Bash(docker exec retro_board-frontend-1 sh -c "cat /proc/net/tcp6 | head -5; cat /proc/net/tcp | head -5")
Bash(docker exec retro_board-frontend-1 sh -c "wget -qO- http://localhost:3000 2>&1 | head -2")
Bash(docker exec retro_board-frontend-1 sh -c "wget -qO- http://127.0.0.1:3000 2>&1 | head -2")
